since_last: 39% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.97%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 39% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.24% · BTC -1.27% · Gold +0.82% · Nasdaq100 -1.52%. 39% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.97%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.97%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.70%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMAT is the standout at -9.53%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +3.71%, WDAY +3.26%, SAP +2.67%, UPST +2.53%, META +1.99%. Laggards: AMAT -9.53%, LRCX -8.36%, TER -8.32%, KLAC -7.77%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.74% at $154.42
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.74% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
